Detailed Description

Device Functionality - Capacitive Feedback
System ID: 0x29

*  | Address | Name        | Default Value | Description                                    |  Type  | Access     |
*  |---------|-------------|---------------|------------------------------------------------|--------|------------|
*  | 0x2900  | CFrunCB     | false (or 0)  | Enable/Disable sensors readout callbacks       | boolean| read write |
*  | 0x2901  | CFvalCB_A   | N/A           | Capacitive sensor normalized value channel A   | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2902  | CFvalCB_B   | N/A           | Capacitive sensor normalized value channel B   | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2903  | CFvalCB_C   | N/A           | Capacitive sensor normalized value channel C   | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2904  | CFval_A     | N/A           | Capacitive sensor raw value channel A          | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2905  | CFval_B     | N/A           | Capacitive sensor raw value channel B          | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2906  | CFval_C     | N/A           | Capacitive sensor raw value channel C          | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2907  | STATUS_A    | N/A           | Device Status Reporting register channel A     | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2908  | STATUS_B    | N/A           | Device Status Reporting register channel B     | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2909  | STATUS_C    | N/A           | Device Status Reporting register channel C     | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x290A  | DEVID_A     | 0x3054        | Device ID register channel A                   | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x290B  | DEVID_B     | 0x3054        | Device ID register channel B                   | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x290C  | DEVID_C     | 0x3054        | Device ID register channel C                   | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x290D  | MUXCFG_A    | 0x020F        | Multiplexing Configuration register channel A  | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x290E  | MUXCFG_B    | 0x020F        | Multiplexing Configuration register channel B  | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x290F  | MUXCFG_C    | 0x020F        | Multiplexing Configuration register channel C  | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2910  | SETTLE_A    | 0x0080        | Settling Reference Count register channel A    | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2911  | SETTLE_B    | 0x0080        | Settling Reference Count register channel B    | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2912  | SETTLE_C    | 0x0080        | Settling Reference Count register channel C    | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2913  | RCOUNT_A    | 0x0080        | Reference Count register channel A             | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2914  | RCOUNT_B    | 0x0080        | Reference Count register channel B             | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2915  | RCOUNT_C    | 0x0080        | Reference Count register channel C             | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2916  | RESDEV_A    | 0x0000        | Device Reset and Output Gain control channel A | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2917  | RESDEV_B    | 0x0000        | Device Reset and Output Gain control channel B | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2918  | RESDEV_C    | 0x0000        | Device Reset and Output Gain control channel C | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2919  | OFFSET_A    | 0x0000        | Conversion Offset channel A                    | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x291A  | OFFSET_B    | 0x0000        | Conversion Offset channel B                    | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x291B  | OFFSET_C    | 0x0000        | Conversion Offset channel C                    | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x291C  | DRVCUR_A    | 0xCC40        | Current drive configuration channel A          | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x291D  | DRVCUR_B    | 0xCC40        | Current drive configuration channel B          | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x291E  | DRVCUR_C    | 0xCC40        | Current drive configuration channel C          | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x291F  | CLKDIV_A    | 0x1002        | Reference divider settings for channel A       | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2920  | CLKDIV_B    | 0x1002        | Reference divider settings for channel B       | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2921  | CLKDIV_C    | 0x1002        | Reference divider settings for channel C       | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2922  | CONFIG_A    | 0x1C01        | Conversion Configuration channel A             | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2923  | CONFIG_B    | 0x1C01        | Conversion Configuration channel B             | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2924  | CONFIG_C    | 0x1C01        | Conversion Configuration channel C             | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2925  | CFref_A     | N/A           | Capacitive sensor norm. ref. value channel A   | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2926  | CFref_B     | N/A           | Capacitive sensor norm. ref. value channel B   | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2927  | CFref_C     | N/A           | Capacitive sensor norm. ref. value channel C   | float  | read only  |
*  |---------|-------------|---------------|------------------------------------------------|--------|------------|
*/
